name: atomic-search
description: Pokemon search UI built on Coveo Atomic — consumes the dual-source Coveo index (Source A: pokemondb-sitemap, Source B: pokemondb-push).
comment: @coveo/atomic is loaded from Coveo's CDN at runtime (see index.html), so it's not an npm dep here. The CDN serves the JS + i18n assets + icons together, which is the supported deployment pattern for hosted Atomic apps.
